role_title: Product Manager, Identity Solutions - Vice President

location.office_time_required: Monday-Thursday in office, remote on Friday

seniority.level: Senior IC / VP (likely Staff or Principal PM equivalent)
level_signals: Minimum of 8 years of experience in product management
Comp range $150K-$190K base consistent with senior IC at a fintech scale-up
Expected to own product roadmap and influence cross-functional teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Minimum of 8 years of experience in product management, preferably within fintech, wealth management, or related industries.
Strong analytical skills, natural problem solver, with a proven track record of solving complex, ambiguous problems and pushing initiatives to conclusions through innovative solutions.
Expertise with QA testing, comfort with leveraging SQL, and ability to generate conclusions based on data.
Proven track record of managing technical teams and projects, organizing requests and prioritizing.
Detail-oriented, with the ability to write comprehensive user stories and acceptance criteria.
Strong interpersonal skills and capable of building relationships to gain buy in and achieve business results.
A willingness and initiative to become an expert in the alternative investments space, understanding both the product intricacies and wider industry to drive informed decision making.
Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively in a results-driven, entrepreneurial environment.
Experience with agile methodologies and a mindset that embraces quick deployment, learning, and iteration.
Excellent communication skills, with the ability to engage executive management for ideas and resolutions.
A customer-centric approach, with experience engaging directly with clients to gather insights and feedback and a knack for quick and thoughtful problem solving.
Flexible and adaptable, able to manage multiple priorities and adjust to changing demands and timelines.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience of developing KYC/AML solutions a plus.

scope.surface: Identity Solutions product — KYC regulatory requirements, AML screening, and alternatives investment onboarding experience
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / fintech platform serving wealth management and alternatives investment clients
core_responsibilities: Lead engagement with end users and clients to identify and deliver solutions to core functional areas and user experiences.
Define product requirements by writing detailed user stories and acceptance criteria for software engineers.
Lead the end-to-end lifecycle of product feature development from conception to launch, including testing and iteration.
Own the product roadmap for specific features or segments of the platform, determining prioritization and ensuring that deliverables are met on time and within scope.
Communicate effectively with business stakeholders to gather requirements, provide updates, and align product vision and strategy.
Develop and maintain comprehensive project communication plans, ensuring transparency and alignment across teams.
Investigate bugs and identify tactical solutions to production issues impacting users.
Monitor the performance of product features post-launch and continuously seek opportunities for improvement.
Maintain awareness of the competitive landscape from a business and legal / compliance perspective.

green_flags: Equity included for all full-time employees plus annual performance bonus
Comprehensive benefits including 100% employer paid dental, vision, telemedicine, and virtual mental health counseling
Clear product surface and ownership area (Identity Solutions / KYC / AML)
Hybrid schedule with Friday remote — more flexibility than fully onsite
Growth opportunity explicitly mentioned ('room to grow and broaden your responsibilities')
New product area means high impact and visibility opportunity
red_flags: Office location city not specified in JD body — candidates cannot confirm geographic fit without additional research
VP title is used but the role appears to be an individual contributor PM role, not a people manager — title inflation common in fintech
KYC/AML domain expertise listed only as 'a plus' yet the entire product is Identity Solutions — may be understated as a true requirement

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from VP title, 8+ years requirement, and comp range)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and industry context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.cities_listed (not stated in JD body; left empty)
ambiguities: KYC/AML experience is listed as 'a plus' at the end of the Candidate Profile, yet the entire product being built is Identity Solutions focused on KYC/AML — this may be more important than a soft requirement in practice.
VP title suggests seniority but the JD does not describe people management responsibilities; treated as senior IC.

Preferred industries listed as 'fintech, wealth management, or related industries' alongside the hard 8-year minimum — industry preference classified as context rather than a separate hard requirement.
